---
id: get-endpoint-config
title: "Get Endpoint Config"
description: "Command to get configured endpoints.If API does not included endpointName argument, then  response includes all active endpoints detailed configuration & list of all saved endpoint names otherwise response includes interested endpoints configuration only"
sidebar_label: "Get Endpoint Config"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gen-2-x-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Endpoint Config"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/get_endpoint_config"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Command to get configured endpoints.If API does not included endpointName argument, then  response includes all active endpoints detailed configuration & list of all saved endpoint names otherwise response includes interested endpoints configuration only

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","x-internal":false,"properties":{"command":{"type":"string","default":"get_endpoint_config","description":"Specifies the operation being performed, in this case, retrieving the endpoint configuration."},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"123","description":"A unique identifier for the request, allowing tracking and debugging of the operation."},"endpointDetails":{"title":"endpointDetails","x-stoplight":{"id":"o28vdd695rdr6"},"type":"object","properties":{"endpointName":{"type":"string"}}}},"required":["command","requestId"]},"examples":{"Active endpoint config":{"description":"Payload to get active endpoint configuration details with all saved endpoint names","value":{"command":"get_endpoint_config","requestId":"abc123"}},"Specific endpoint config":{"description":"Payload to get the specified endpoint configurations","value":{"command":"get_endpoint_config","requestId":"def456","endpointDetails":{"endpointName":"ctrl"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"get_endpoint_config name of the endpoint, e.g., \"MDM\" for Mobile Device Management."},"epType":{"type":"string","example":"MGMT","enum":["MGMT","MGMT_EVT","CONTROL","DATA","COMMON","SOTI"],"description":"The type of endpoint, specifying its functionality (e.g., Management, Control, by the endpoint, such as MQTT or HTTP."},"activate":{"type":"boolean","default":false,"description":"Indicates whether the endpoint is activated (true or false)."},"url":{"type":"string","example":"soti.example.com","description":"The URL of the endpoint, specifying its address."},"verificationType":{"type":"string","example":"VERIFY_HOST_PEER","enum":["NONE","VERIFY_PEER","VERIFY_HOST","VERIFY_HOST_PEER"],"description":"The type of verification to be used for the endpoint connection."},"port":{"type":"integer","example":1883,"description":"The port number used for the connection."},"qosCommon":{"type":"integer","example":1,"description":"The Quality of Service (QoS) level for message delivery."},"tenantId":{"type":"string","example":"ZEBRA","description":"The tenant's unique identifier."},"mqttParams":{"type":"object","properties":{"keepAlive":{"type":"integer","maximum":65535,"example":300,"description":"The keep-alive interval for the MQTT connection."},"cleanSession":{"type":"boolean","default":true,"description":"Indicates whether the MQTT session should be clean (true or false)."},"reconnectDelayMin":{"type":"integer","description":"Minimum delay before reconnecting in case of disconnection."},"reconnectDelayMax":{"type":"integer","description":"Maximum delay before reconnecting in case of disconnection."},"clientId":{"type":"string","example":"zebra-rfd40-01","description":"The client ID used for the MQTT subscribe."},"qos":{"type":"integer","description":"The QoS level for the subscription."},"retain":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether the message should be retained."}},"required":["topic","qos","retain"]},"description":"A list of topics to which the client will subscribe."}}},"securityParams":{"type":"object","properties":{"format":{"type":"string","enum":["PEM","PFX"],"example":"PEM","description":"The format of the security certificate (e.g., PEM or enable fw update events"},"gpi":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable gpi events"},"network":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable network events"},"exceptions":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable exception events"},"ntp":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable battery triggered"},"temperatureThreshold":{"type":"integer","description":"temperature treshold value above which alert will be triggered"}},"description":"Reference to the event configuration reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported
